$comment: Amazon S3 bucket CORS configuration (JSON form used by the S3 console). Docs: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/userguide/ManageCorsUsing.html
title: Amazon S3 bucket CORS configuration
description: JSON CORS configuration document for an Amazon S3 bucket. Matches the array-of-rules shape accepted by the S3 console and PutBucketCors.

ID.description: Optional unique identifier for the rule.

AllowedMethods.description: HTTP methods the origin is allowed to execute.

AllowedOrigins.description: Origins allowed to make cross-origin requests. Use * to allow all.

AllowedHeaders.description: Headers allowed in a preflight Access-Control-Request-Headers value. Supports a single * wildcard per entry.

ExposeHeaders.description: Response headers that browsers may expose to client applications.

MaxAgeSeconds.description: Seconds browsers may cache a preflight response.
